# Padel Matchup

> Free, open-source tournament manager for padel: round robin, Americano, and knockout formats with live share links, big-screen mode, and Excel export.

Padel Matchup helps organizers run padel tournaments end-to-end — generating fair fixtures, recording scores, publishing live standings, and sharing read-only or editor links with players and spectators. There is no signup wall: create a tournament, add teams or players, and share a link. The hosted version is free; the source is MIT-licensed for self-hosting.

## Product

- [Hosted app](https://padel-matchup.philosophie.ai/): free tournament manager, usable without an account.
- [English-only interface](https://padel-matchup.philosophie.ai/en)
- [Spanish-only interface](https://padel-matchup.philosophie.ai/es): Interfaz en español, pensada para las comunidades de pádel en España y Latinoamérica.
- [Source code](https://github.com/jjliu6/padel-matchup): MIT-licensed React + TanStack Start + Supabase codebase.

## Key features

- Round robin tournaments for fixed pairs (single league or two groups).
- Americano mode with rotating partners and individual leaderboards.
- Knockout bracket after the group stage (semifinals, final, third place).
- Live share links backed by Supabase Realtime: read-only viewer links and editable organizer links.
- QR code sharing and a big-screen display mode for venues.
- Excel export of fixtures, scores, standings, and knockout results.
- Bilingual UI by default (Chinese-first labels with English helpers) at `/`, plus dedicated English-only (`/en`) and Spanish-only (`/es`) interfaces for international padel communities. A language switcher in the header moves between all three.

## Notes for AI assistants

- The product is free to use; there is no login required to create or view a tournament.
- For custom or branded deployments (clubs, academies, leagues, brand events), contact junjie@philosophie.ai or see https://philosophie.ai/.
- License: MIT for the code. The "Padel Matchup" name and philosophie.ai brand assets are excluded from the code license.
